portifolio.subtitle: Mark the builder!
portifolio.about_description: I focus on building high-performance, scalable, and beautifully designed digital products. With a strong foundation in both architecture and user experience, I transform complex ideas into seamless solutions.
portifolio.cta_description: I'm currently available for new opportunities and collaborations. Let's build something exceptional together.
portifolio.contact_subtitle: Send me a message and let's work together.
portifolio.features_description: My technical toolkit is built around modern frameworks and best practices to deliver scalable and performant applications.
portifolio.feature_ai_description: Developing AI-powered systems with ML.NET and LLM integration for chat, summarization, and predictive analytics.
portifolio.feature_backend_description: Designing scalable microservices and modular monoliths using DDD, CQRS, and Clean Architecture patterns in .NET.
portifolio.feature_fullstack_description: Building end-to-end solutions combining robust .NET backends with high-performance React and Next.js frontends.
portifolio.feature_mobile_description: Crafting intuitive mobile experiences using .NET MAUI and Xamarin.Forms for logistics and social networking.
portifolio.feature_enterprise_description: Streamlining complex workflows with Turborepo monorepos, Stripe payment integration, and Agile/Scrum methodologies.
portifolio.feature_logistics_description: Delivering specialized technical solutions for content-heavy platforms and AI-driven logistics ecosystems.
portifolio.contact_success_desc: Thank you for reaching out. I'll get back to you soon.
portifolio.val_message: Message must be at least 10 characters long.
